---
## Goal
- Add `context.Context` parameter (`ctx`) to multiple symbols in `github.com/hashicorp/boundary/internal/credential/vault` across the whole repository

## Constraints & Preferences
- Refactor all function signatures to include `ctx context.Context` parameter
- Make changes across the entire repository
- Ensure project typechecks after all changes are applied

## Progress
### Done
- Created todo list with 24+ items tracking symbols to refactor: `CredentialStore.client`, `newClient`, `client.renewToken`, `client.renewLease`, `client.swapToken`, `toProto`, `toStorageStaticStore`, `toStorageVaultStore`, `NewService`, `validateUpdateRequest`, `validateCreateRequest`, `extractClientCertAndPk`, `decodePemBlocks`, and client methods (`get`, `capabilities`, `ping`, `revokeToken`, `revokeLease`, `lookupToken`, `post`)
- Identified target package: `github.com/hashicorp/boundary/internal/credential/vault`
- Confirmed status: project is ok with 1723 files, 426 packages

### In Progress
- Searching for symbols using `ago_query` to locate function signatures in vault package
- Discovered `newClient` at `/private/var/folders/9f/txt0j2rs2wx3lqx9vfj9x3240000gn/T/BenchmarkRenameqwen3.5-9b-udq4boundary_b4b95e0fsemantic2180790996/001/boundary/internal/credential/vault/vault.go:47:6`
- Discovered `client.renewToken` at position 115 in vault.go
- Started viewing symbols to understand current function structures (retried multiple times due to query parameter issues)

### Blocked
- Need to successfully view and edit symbol definitions using ago_view or similar commands before making changes

## Key Decisions
- No decisions yet; task is starting phase of locating all target symbols for refactoring

## Next Steps
1. Locate all target symbols in the vault package using `ago_query` searches
2. View each symbol's definition to understand current signatures requiring context parameter additions
3. Add `ctx context.Context` parameter to all identified function/method signatures
4. Update callers throughout repository to pass context where needed
5. Verify project typechecks after all changes are applied

## Critical Context
- Target symbols appear in package: `github.com/hashicorp/boundary/internal/credential/vault`
- Some methods have pattern `client.xxx` (e.g., `client.renewToken`, `client.renewLease`) which are receiver methods on `*client` type
- Function `decodePemBlocks` was mentioned but search not yet executed for this symbol

## Relevant Files
- `/private/var/folders/9f/txt0j2rs2wx3lqx9vfj9x3240000gn/T/BenchmarkRenameqwen3.5-9b-udq4boundary_b4b95e0fsemantic2180790996/001/boundary/internal/credential/vault/vault.go` - primary target file
- `/private/var/folders/9f/txt0j2rs2wx3lqx9vfj9x3240000gn/T/BenchmarkRenameqwen3.5-9b-udq4boundary_b4b95e0fsemantic2180790996/001/boundary/internal/credential/vault/client_certificate.go` - mentioned in symbol search
